strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple senior roles
Proven fullstack breadth from databases to UI, with DevOps and Docker/Kubernetes exposure
Track record of clean architecture, TDD, and mentoring/knowledge sharing
concerns: Vastly overqualified for an entry-level junior/mid role — likely retention risk
Limited explicit PostgreSQL experience (resume emphasizes MongoDB and MySQL)
No Nest.js mentioned and high on-site presence required in Berlin may need confirmation
response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced fullstack engineer whose technical profile far exceeds the stated requirements, covering TypeScript, React, Node.js, REST APIs, AWS, Kubernetes, and even LLM/agent tooling. The main tension is seniority: this is an entry-level position and the candidate has 10+ years of senior/staff-level experience, which raises questions about role fit, compensation expectations, and longevity. Database experience leans toward MongoDB rather than PostgreSQL, and Nest.js is not mentioned, though both gaps are easily bridgeable given his background.
